sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ الطِّفْلُ أَنْ يَشْمَعَ قِصَّةً قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je htjelo čuti priču prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: The child wanted to hear a story before sleeping.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ الْأَبُ تَطْبِيقًا لِلْقِصَصِ عَلَى الْهَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je otvorio aplikaciju za priče na telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: The father opened a stories app on the phone.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَ الطِّفْلُ قِصَّةً عَنِ الْأَسَدِ وَالْخَرُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je odabralo priču o lavu i ovci.
sentences.translationEn: The child chose a story about a lion and a sheep.

sentences.translation: Dijete je slušalo i zaspalo uskoro.
sentences.translationEn: The child listened and fell asleep soon after.
